name: Prospect — No events program
description: For companies not yet running webinars. Consultative angle: here's what you're missing and why it matters for your industry.

fields.label: Industry
fields.placeholder: e.g. SaaS, Healthcare, Public sector, Financial services…

fields.label: Their main use case
fields.placeholder: e.g. product showcase, pipeline generation, customer education, thought leadership
fields.hint: Combined with industry to personalise examples and copy throughout the page.

fields.label: Your observation (optional)
fields.placeholder: I noticed you publish a weekly newsletter but don't have a live events program yet…
fields.hint: 1–2 sentences showing you've done your homework. Leave blank and it won't appear on the page.

fields.label: Their challenge 1
fields.default: Generating qualified pipeline beyond paid channels is getting harder
fields.placeholder: e.g. MQL quality from paid is declining

fields.label: Their challenge 2 (optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Hard to build thought leadership at scale

fields.label: Booking link (optional)
fields.hint: Replaces the email CTA with a direct booking link.
